title: MCPvP Essentials
description: An all-in-one resource pack for every PvP type.
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e8625169084132438a13e3daa08a9450fcd206f.png)
## One Pack for Every PvP Mode — made for clean, competitive fights

No matter what you play, PvP can get *visually* messy real fast — **totem pop particles**, **explosion effects**, **block particles**, and **fire overlays** can stack up and block your view. This pack keeps things **clean and readable** by removing or shrinking the exact stuff that clutters your screen, so you can stay focused on the fight and actually see what’s happening.

## Built for every type of PvP

* **SMP:** made for survival-style fights where **screen space matters**. The **smaller shield look** keeps your view open while you’re trading hits, and the **lower fire overlay + removed block particles** helps a ton in real terrain fights (bridging, blocking off, breaking blocks).
* **Vanilla (Crystal / Anchor PvP):** crystal/anchor fights are pure visual chaos. **Explosion particles removed**, **totem particles removed**, **smaller totem pop**, plus **lower fire overlay / smaller ground fire** helps you track players and keep your crosshair where it needs to be.
* **Pot PvP:** fast duels, constant resets, nonstop re-peeks. Removing **crit particles** and keeping **items smaller** helps you stay locked on your target.
* **UHC:** UHC kits are usually utility-heavy (blocks, fire/lava situations, messy close fights). The **lower fire overlay / smaller ground fire** and **removed block particles** are clutch when the fight turns into a tight-space scramble.
* **Sword PvP:** sword kits are all about clean tracking during trades/combos. **Crit particles removed** and **smaller items** keep your opponent from getting hidden behind random effects.
* **Axe PvP:** axe fights revolve around **shield interactions**. The **smaller shield look** means less of your screen gets covered while you’re timing disables and playing around shield windows.
* **Netherite OP:** OP kits usually mean heavier gear and way more happening on-screen. This pack strips the biggest offenders: **block particles**, **fire overlays**, plus **smaller items** so you can actually read the fight.
* **Mace:** mace PvP is super movement/read-based (smash hits, vertical spacing, spacing checks). A **clean screen** matters a lot here — reduced clutter helps you keep track of the player when things get hectic.
* **LTMs / Overall:** since LTMs rotate and mix rulesets, this pack works as a solid “visibility baseline” for basically anything chaotic: fewer particles, smaller overlays, less clutter.

## What does it change?

This pack:

* **Removes totem particles**
* **Shrinks the totem pop animation**
* **Removes explosion particles**
* **Removes block particles**
* **Lowers the fire overlay and shrinks ground fire visuals**
* **Makes items smaller**
* **Gives shields a smaller look and many more..**

## Why it’s worth it

* You don’t need to download and combine a bunch of separate packs like “No Particles”, “Smaller Fire”, “Smaller Totem”, “Smaller Shield”, etc.
* It only edits the features listed above, so it won’t mess with your other textures.
  You can safely use it alongside your favorite resource packs in Minecraft.
